intro_highlights.text: EntitySAM: Segment Everything in Video Mingqiao Ye1,* Seoung Wug Oh2 Lei Ke3 Joon-Young Lee2 1EPFL 2Adobe Research 3Carnegie Mellon University Video SAM2 DEVA EntitySAM Frame 0 51 63 66 69 72 87 (Ours) Figure 1.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Zero-shot video entity segmentation performance comparison on VIPEntitySeg dataset using models trained on COCO, showing: 1) SAM 2 [39] using Mask2Former [7] mask prompts for the initial frame, 2) Mask2Former with DEV A [11] association, and 3) our proposed EntitySAM.
intro_highlights.rewrite_zh: 该句用于引言中高密度阐述问题背景或方法动机，语义完整且可直接复用。
intro_highlights.reusable_pattern: In <scenario>, <challenge> remains difficult because <key bottleneck>, motivating <our idea>.

intro_highlights.text: Our EntitySAM enhances SAM 2 by automatically segmenting and tracking novel entities without requiring userspecified prompts, achieving superior performance compared to existing state-of-the-art zero-shot tracking methods.

architecture_mapping.paper_evidence: 引言通常先定义任务场景与应用价值。
中段会指出现有方法在复杂场景下的失败模式。
末段给出方法主线与贡献列表。
